subject: This week in data: 14 new MLflow integrations, Unity Catalog updates
body_text:
Hi there,

Here's what's new in the Databricks ecosystem this week:

- MLflow 2.18 ships with native PyTorch Lightning 2.x integration
- Unity Catalog now supports row-level security for views
- Delta Sharing connectors for Snowflake and BigQuery moved to GA
- 6 community-contributed tutorials on streaming ETL patterns

Read the full digest at https://databricks-weekly.com/2026-21

Manage subscription: https://databricks-weekly.com/preferences
